criteria.name: Full test suite passes
criteria.evidence: 3 test failures remain after Ralph fixes: (1) test_data_refresh.py:81 pd not defined (missing pandas import after refactor), (2) test_v2_pipeline.py:645 test_race_condition_fixed fails because serial marker was removed from test_data_refresh.py when ouroboros class deleted, (3) test_data_refresh.py:176 jupyter not installed (infra). Ralph fixed all 7 original failing nodes but introduced 1 new bug and 1 cascading issue. 7/8 AC passing.

failing_nodes.message: NameError name pd is not defined. The refactored test_north_rustico_dec2022_loads_without_error uses pd.concat() but pandas is not imported at module level. Add import pandas as pd to the module imports.

test_race_condition_fixed checks for pytest.mark.serial in test_data_refresh.py. Ralph correctly deleted the ouroboros TestACREF3 class which had the serial marker. Fix: update test to check for pytest.mark.e2e instead, or remove this gate test since the ouroboros recursion was the actual race condition.
test_notebook_executes_without_error fails because jupyter is not installed in the environment. Mark with pytest.mark.e2e and add jupyter to requirements-dev.txt, or skip when jupyter unavailable.

summary: Phase 7 E2E validation: REJECT. Ralph fixed all 7 original failing nodes from the prior review. test_validation.py now passes completely, imputation_report schema check works, manifest rows field added, glob patterns fixed, and ouroboros tests deleted. However 3 new failures appeared: a missing pandas import in test_data_refresh.py from the refactor, a cascading failure in test_race_condition_fixed because the serial marker was removed with the ouroboros class, and jupyter not available. First two are code issues for Ralph; third is infra. 7/8 AC criteria now passing.
